title: The Colorful River of Cano Cristales

segments.text: This river flows with vibrant colors like a rainbow.
It's found in Meta Province, Colombia.
The colors are due to a unique aquatic plant called Macarenia.
It can only be seen during a few months each year.
A must-see natural wonder for adventurers.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Cano Cristales, Meta Province — Colombia. A river that flows with vibrant colors. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
